subject: Re: taking a break
body:
Hi Alister,

Please enjoy your break, it is well deserved! And thanks for all the help, 
and often very quick response to github issues. It is much appreciated.

Best,
Rasmus

søndag den 1. februar 2026 kl. 09.44.45 UTC+1 skrev joe dobbs:

> Hi Alister,
>
> Your help has been crucial for a really large number of people, and I echo 
> the others in saying that it is greatly appreciated.
>
> Wishing you all the best,
> Joe
> On Sunday, February 1, 2026 at 2:01:51 AM UTC+1 reika.wa...@gmail.com 
> wrote:
>
>> Dear Allister, 
>>
>> I genuinely agree with Tom and Hamid and many others who share same 
>> gratitude with you over several years. 
>>
>> I wish you have excellent time during break. 
>> All the best 🎊🎉💐
>>
>> Reika 
>>
>> On Sat, Jan 31, 2026, 16:25 Hamidreza Rahmani <hami...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>>> I second that for sure!
>>>
>>> Hamid
>>>
>>> On Sat, Jan 31, 2026, 16:08 thomas.la...@gmail.com <
>>> thomas.la...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>>
>>>> Hi Alister,
>>>>
>>>> Thank you for all your help and encouragement over the years on this 
>>>> forum and the Dynamo message boards!
>>>>
>>>> I know many of my projects would not have been possible without your 
>>>> tutorials, quick replies, and python libraries.
>>>>
>>>> Enjoy the break!
>>>>
>>>> There should be plenty of collective knowledge in the community to 
>>>> field questions in your absence.
>>>>  
>>>> Cheers!
>>>> -Tom
>>>>
>>>> On Friday, January 30, 2026 at 10:06:13 PM UTC-8 alist...@gmail.com 
>>>> wrote:
>>>>
>>>>> Hi all, 
>>>>>
>>>>> I’m about to take an extended break from work so won’t be responding 
>>>>> to any messages about warp/tomography/subtomogram averaging. 
>>>>>
>>>>> Apologies if you’ve been left hanging recently, I know I’ve not been 
>>>>> on top of the mailing list/github issues. 
>>>>>
>>>>> Tomography is still tough, please be generous with your knowledge if 
>>>>> you see someone asking for help. 
>>>>>
>>>>> Take care and happy processing, 
>>>>>
>>>>> Alister 
>>>>>
>>>>> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>>>>
